sections.paragraph:
κούφισμα, ατος, τό (s. prec. entry; Eur., Phoen. 860; Plut., Mor. 114c) the cause of someth. being less burdensome, lightening, alleviation of almsgiving κ. ἁμαρτίας γίνεται lightens the load of sin 2 Cl 16:4 (after 1 Esdr 8:84 σύ, κύριε, ἐκούφισας τὰς ἁμαρτίας ἡμῶν; cp. 2 Esdr 9:13).—DELG s.v. κοῦφος.

prec. prec. = preceding

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

someth. someth. = something

2 Cl 2 Cl = 2 Clement—List 1

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 563
